Sign.title: Sign Document
Sign.upload_hint: Click or drag PDF to upload
Sign.qr_hint: Position the QR code exactly where you want your cryptographic signature to appear.
Sign.success_desc: Signature has been embedded and metadata successfully registered.
Sign.extension_desc: Please download and install our browser extension to secure and sign your PDFs offline.

Dashboard.sign_new_doc_desc: Upload a PDF and place your cryptographic QR signature securely.
Dashboard.my_documents_desc: View documents stored in your connected Google Drive.
Dashboard.cert_none_desc: Generate a certificate to sign documents offline with cryptographic certainty.
Dashboard.warning_desc: You already have an active certificate registered in the system.
Dashboard.warning_continue: If you continue to create/replace with a new certificate:
Dashboard.warning_item1: Your old certificate will automatically be
Dashboard.warning_item2: ALL PDF documents you have previously signed will become
Dashboard.warning_item3: The status of old documents will change to
Dashboard.warning_confirm: Are you sure you want to continue?
Dashboard.cert_issued_desc: Your certificate and secure key have been generated and saved locally.
Dashboard.extension_alert: TrustlessSign Extension is required. Please install the extension first.
Dashboard.install_ext_desc: TrustlessSign extension is required to generate cryptographic certificates safely in your browser. This guarantees your private key never touches our servers.
Dashboard.ext_outdated_desc: Your extension (v{{current}}) is outdated. Please update to v{{required}} or newer to continue signing documents.

Welcome.title: Zero-Trust Digital Signatures
Welcome.desc: Sign documents offline via Chrome Extension. Verify instantly with cryptographic certainty. No central authority required.
Welcome.modal_desc: Authentication is required to sign documents and save them.
